subcodes.title: Words spoken at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-06-19
subcodes.first_line: The chain of creation is interwoven in a natural law and divine order. Everything is interlinked. A link cannot be broken without affecting that natural order.
subcodes.first_line_orig: سلسلهٴ موجودات بیک قانون عمومی و نظام الهی مربوطست و جمیع کائنات بهم مرتبط نمی شود
subcodes.subjects: @composition and decomposition, @one universal law; attractive power of love, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @law of cause and effect
